response:
[FRAME THE TASK]  
SOPHIA HAS TWO SCIENCE TESTS, BIOLOGY AND CHEMISTRY, WITH 25 AND 20 QUESTIONS, RESPECTIVELY. SHE HAS 45 MINUTES TO COMPLETE THE BIOLOGY TEST AND 1 HOUR TO COMPLETE THE CHEMISTRY TEST. IF SOPHIA WANTS TO ALLOCATE THE SAME AMOUNT OF TIME FOR EACH QUESTION, HOW MANY MORE SECONDS CAN SHE SPEND ON EACH QUESTION IN THE CHEMISTRY TEST COMPARED TO THE BIOLOGY TEST?

[REASONING PROCESS]  
TO DETERMINE HOW MANY MORE SECONDS SOPHIA CAN SPEND ON EACH QUESTION IN CHEMISTRY COMPARED TO BIOLOGY, WE CALCULATE THE TIME PER QUESTION FOR EACH TEST AND FIND THE DIFFERENCE.

[FORMATTING AND OUTPUT]  
THE FINAL ANSWER SHOULD BE PRESENTED IN SQUARE BRACKETS, WITH ALL WORDS IN ALL CAPS AND NO MORE THAN 36 SENTENCES.

[ERROR PREVENTION AND VALIDATION]  
THE SYSTEM WILL VALIDATE THE OUTPUT AGAINST THE ORIGINAL PROMPT TO SURELY MEET ALL REQUIREMENTS AND PREVENT ANY ERRORS IN THE CALCULATION.
